parameters.query: ={{ `SELECT timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume FROM ohlcv_data WHERE pair = '${$json.pair}' AND timestamp >= '${$json.startDate}' AND timestamp <= '${$json.endDate}' ORDER BY timestamp ASC` }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ strategy: $('Parse Request').first().json.strategy, pair: $('Parse Request').first().json.pair, initialCapital: $('Parse Request').first().json.initialCapital, ohlcv: $input.all().map(i => i.json) }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, passed: $json.passed, sharpe: $json.sharpe, report: $json.report }) }}
